cases.prompt: 라이프사이클 CRM 캠페인 설계해줘. 윈백이랑 온보딩 시퀀스 포함.

assertions.text: Builds RFM/behavioral segments and a trigger·audience·message matrix.
Includes channel mapping and holdout/measurement design.

cases.prompt: Design a CRM sequence with retention messages on top of our existing email/push plumbing.

assertions.text: Layers who/when/what on top of growth-engine sending plumbing (delegates infra).
